sentences: Before movement, the left arm on the left body side prepares a broad palm hold.
Before movement, the right arm on the right body side prepares a broad palm hold.
Before movement, the left arm on the left body side prepares a fine fingertip hold.
Before movement, the right arm on the right body side prepares a fine fingertip hold.
During transport, the left arm on the left body side carries a broad palm hold.
During transport, the right arm on the right body side carries a broad palm hold.
During transport, the left arm on the left body side carries a fine fingertip hold.
During transport, the right arm on the right body side carries a fine fingertip hold.
At object contact, the left arm on the left body side completes a broad palm hold.
At object contact, the right arm on the right body side completes a broad palm hold.
At object contact, the left arm on the left body side completes a fine fingertip hold.
At object contact, the right arm on the right body side completes a fine fingertip hold.
In the pre-reach interval, the left workspace effector prepares broad whole-palm contact.
In the pre-reach interval, the right workspace effector prepares broad whole-palm contact.
In the pre-reach interval, the left workspace effector prepares narrow fingertip contact.
In the pre-reach interval, the right workspace effector prepares narrow fingertip contact.
In the reach interval, the left workspace effector transports broad whole-palm contact.
In the reach interval, the right workspace effector transports broad whole-palm contact.
In the reach interval, the left workspace effector transports narrow fingertip contact.
In the reach interval, the right workspace effector transports narrow fingertip contact.
In the grasp interval, the left workspace effector closes broad whole-palm contact.
In the grasp interval, the right workspace effector closes broad whole-palm contact.
In the grasp interval, the left workspace effector closes narrow fingertip contact.
In the grasp interval, the right workspace effector closes narrow fingertip contact.
Readiness context: left motor channel, broad-force object hold.
Readiness context: right motor channel, broad-force object hold.
Readiness context: left motor channel, fine-control object hold.
Readiness context: right motor channel, fine-control object hold.

Transport context: right motor channel, fine-control object hold.

Contact context: right motor channel, broad-force object hold.
Contact context: left motor channel, fine-control object hold.
Contact context: right motor channel, fine-control object hold.

Early motor state with the right hemispace limb ready for a large-surface hold.
Early motor state with the left hemispace limb ready for a small-surface hold.
Early motor state with the right hemispace limb ready for a small-surface hold.
Middle motor state with the left hemispace limb moving for a large-surface hold.

Middle motor state with the right hemispace limb moving for a small-surface hold.
Late motor state with the left hemispace limb contacting for a large-surface hold.
Late motor state with the right hemispace limb contacting for a large-surface hold.
Late motor state with the left hemispace limb contacting for a small-surface hold.
Late motor state with the right hemispace limb contacting for a small-surface hold.
Preparatory epoch: sinistral left-side action, encompassing grip style.
Preparatory epoch: dextral right-side action, encompassing grip style.
Preparatory epoch: sinistral left-side action, pinpoint grip style.
Preparatory epoch: dextral right-side action, pinpoint grip style.

Approach epoch: dextral right-side action, encompassing grip style.
Approach epoch: sinistral left-side action, pinpoint grip style.

Closure epoch: sinistral left-side action, pinpoint grip style.
Closure epoch: dextral right-side action, pinpoint grip style.
Pre-movement left-side trial: left effector prepares a broad stable hold.
Pre-movement right-side trial: right effector prepares a broad stable hold.
Pre-movement left-side trial: left effector prepares a delicate precise hold.
Pre-movement right-side trial: right effector prepares a delicate precise hold.

Transport right-side trial: right effector carries a broad stable hold.
Transport left-side trial: left effector carries a delicate precise hold.
Transport right-side trial: right effector carries a delicate precise hold.
Contact left-side trial: left effector completes a broad stable hold.
Contact right-side trial: right effector completes a broad stable hold.
Contact left-side trial: left effector completes a delicate precise hold.
Contact right-side trial: right effector completes a delicate precise hold.

Initial phase; lateral-right axis; high-area grip.
